Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Text: Definition The temporal profile maps pairs of activities A B to average time standard deviation This covers all pairs where A eventually follows B in at least one execution not just immediate successors

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
